Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class EmbeddedServiceMenuItem2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.EmbeddedServiceMenuItem2
public class EmbeddedServiceMenuItem2 extends SObject

Java class for EmbeddedServiceMenuItem complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="EmbeddedServiceMenuItem">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Channel" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChannelId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChannelType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CustomUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DisplayOrder" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EmbeddedServiceMenu" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}EmbeddedServiceMenuSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EmbeddedServiceMenuId" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IconUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDisplayedOnPageLoad" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ItemName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OsOptionsHideInIOS" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OsOptionsHideInLinuxOS" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OsOptionsHideInMacOS" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OsOptionsHideInOtherOS" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OsOptionsHideInWindowsOS" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PhoneNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ShouldOpenUrlInSameTab" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
